scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,api -c green,blue "npm run dev" "npm run server"
scripts.build:pages: npm run build:hcp-cache && tsc -b && vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && touch dist/.nojekyll && rm -f dist/_redirects
scripts.deploy:pages: VITE_BASE_PATH=/NGC-Brain/ npm run build:pages && gh-pages -d dist --dotfiles --nojekyll -m 'Deploy NGC dashboard to GitHub Pages'
scripts.deploy:pages:root: VITE_BASE_PATH=/ npm run build:pages && echo 'Built for root URL (https://ngc4160.github.io/). Copy dist/ into your ngc4160.github.io repo.'
